_comment: Single source of truth for heatmap colormaps, shared by the web frontend (praxis/web/src/js/colormaps.js, generated by build.py) and the research-paper figures (tools/export_geometries.py). Stops are [position 0..1, [r, g, b] 0..255], interpolated linearly.

praxis_heat.description: Black -> red -> orange -> yellow -> white. High-contrast 'hot' ramp that keeps low-density structure visible in both the dashboard and the printed PDF.
